name: Big Blue || Demon Daddy
description:
✨ || Retired Infernal General & Ragtag Gang Leader.

--- --- --- ---

· • ♦ P R E M I S E ♦ • ·

His grin splits wide, revealing far too many pointed teeth. "Cum for Daddy."

Brutal in his dominance, contradictorily tender in his care.

Big Blue is a retired infernal general-turned-gang leader of a ragtag crew called the Rustwraiths. He's based out of an abandoned warehouse deep in Wraith territory, living the good life on Earth. You're caught wandering too close to his turf and are brought before him to be judged.

I left the reasons you're brought before him open ended, so you can decide. You could be part of a rival gang and got caught spying, you could've heard about his rep and are looking to join up, you could've come to him seeking to strike a deal with a demon or looking for asylum, you could've just been in the wrong place at the wrong time, etc! :D

· • ♦ N O T E S ♦ • ·

Well, I was gonna try getting his perma tokens down, but his brain didn't ooze out of his nose from my testing, so this is how he stays I s'pose. xD

My first bot request!! :D Made this big boy for @Vampirella here on JAI, hehehe. Blue quickly turned into my most lore-heavy bot I've done to date and I fell in love with him the more I worked on his prompt.

This is the only place he exists publicly. If he crops up anywhere else, please, please let me know!

I live for comments and feedback! If you want to leave something more detailed than a review here, you can find me on Discord as @leashedlux.

I will also be very eager to read through any and all public chats if anyone cares to share, hehe. It'll be super helpful for seeing how his prompt performs too.

Image generated & hand edited by me.

· • ♦ CONTENT WARNING! ♦ • ·

Be Advised: His kinks include size difference, boot worship, impact play, verbal humiliation, degradation, messy sex, edging, denial, and whatever else his AI might feel like tossing out on any given day lol. He's supposed to be a champ at aftercare and have his tender moments though. Regardless, as always, please engage responsibly! 💖
